title: Momonosuke Faces Wano’s Future
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Law, Nami, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Luffy as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Cut it out already!!! Open your eyes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That's 'cause you keep smashing through walls!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just grit your teeth and look where you're going!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Kaido- Sama's wrecking havoc up here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What...?! How can there be two dragons?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This one's a different color!! We have to get to the bottom of this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sounds like things are getting out of hand down there...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It must be because of that damn Linlin. The castle will need to be rebuilt after this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I won't let it end like this....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We need to get to solid ground!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There's Kaido!! Let's crash-land over there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You were keeping Kaido busy for us?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thanks a bunch, we owe you big time!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
